Design Flutter onboarding, first-run, empty states, and activation flows.

## Principles

- Get users to value quickly.
- Keep setup steps short and recoverable.
- Use native navigation and progress patterns.
- Make permission requests contextual and explain their value.
- Avoid blocking returning users with repeated education.
- Support skip, back, and resume.

## Flutter Considerations

Handle SafeArea, system back, deep links, app resume, text scaling, localization, and analytics or persistence hooks already used by the app.
